summary: Missing Set-StrictMode in both PowerShell scripts (critical omission). Regex patterns duplicated between Get-CommitBumpType (lines 73-85) and New-ChangelogEntry (lines 155-165)—maintenance liability if format changes. Run-ActTests.ps1 fragile: hardcoded file lists (lines 85-100), git errors masked by 2>&1|Out-Null (lines 125-130), no fixture validation. Workflow redundantly shows results (lines 70-82 and 86-97). Otherwise solid structure and convention usage.
